P/T JUDGE MARY WISS, RPTR. B. FIELDS, CLK. R. CONTRERAS ATTY. FOR PLTF. JOHN ZANGHI ATTY. FOR DEFT. JOHN S. CHANG 2PM C/C FOR SETTL. CONF. STIP. FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMNT: POSS. AND RESTIT. OF 42 BELVEDERE ST, SFCA. RENT $1,075.00 AND COSTS $120.00. WRIT ISSUE F/W. STAY 8/10/94 AT 8AM. NO OTHER OCCUPANT. PERSONAL POSSESSIONS LEFT BEHIND ARE ABANDONED. DEFT. WAIVES STAY. EACH WAIVE CLAIM EXCEPT BEYOND ORDINARY WARE AND TEAR. DEFT. WILLL DISMISS PETITION W/RENT BOARD. PLTF. TO RETURN DEFT. $500.00 SEC. DEPOSIT. IF DEFT. TIMELY, PLTF. WILL DISMISS WITHIN 5 DAYS. EACH SIDE BEAR OWN FEES AND COSTS. PLTF. WILL INSPECT PREMISES 7/25/94.
